name: ikman.lk
notes: Largest classified site. Path-based URLs only (robots.txt disallows ?sort/?query/?filters params); budget is filtered client-side. Listings parsed from the window.initialData JSON blob.

name: LankaPropertyWeb
notes: Dedicated real-estate portal. Static search pages: /forsale-{Province}_{City}-{Type}.html and /rentals/lease-{Province}_{City}-{Type}.html. Query-string search URLs are disallowed by robots.txt.

name: house.lk
notes: Secondary source. Path URLs /{sale|rent}/{district}/{city}/{type}/. Shares LankaPropertyWeb's backend and listing IDs — duplicates are removed via refId.

name: LankaLand.lk
notes: Secondary source. WordPress site; /search-results?category=&city=&status=. Small inventory, prices often 'Negotiable'.

name: patpat.lk
notes: robots.txt disallows ALL crawling and the server 403s non-browser clients. Never scrape — only a manual browse link is shown.

name: CeylonProperty.lk
notes: robots.txt disallows all listing-search entry points (/search, /buy-property-in-, /rent-, /lands). Never scrape those — only a manual browse link is shown.

name: Facebook Marketplace
notes: No public API. Do not scrape. This source only generates a pre-filled search URL for the user to browse manually.
